mapper.insert: insert into bi_quality_score (table_id, score, score_type, field_id, calculated_at, create_by, create_time, remark) values (#{tableId}, #{score}, #{scoreType}, #{fieldId}, #{calculatedAt}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{remark})
mapper.select: select id, table_id, score, score_type, field_id, calculated_at, create_by, create_time, remark from bi_quality_score where table_id = #{tableId} order by calculated_at desc
